title: HGL Make Your Own Concert Bracelets - Small Box (Styles Vary)
features: Make Your Own Concert Bracelets - Small Box (Styles Vary)
description: Product description These Concert Bracelets Kits are the ultimate accessory for music lovers and fashionistas alike. Each kit is a symphony of style, featuring specially curated charms and a vibrant selection of beads that scream personality and pizzazz. From rockin' guitars to dazzling stars, we've got designs that'll make wrists sing! A striking assortment of 4 single styles, each including 2 premium charms and an array of beads. Each set includes everything you need to make your own beautiful concert bracelets. With 4 specific stunning styles, you will want them all! These concert bracelet making kits hit all the right notes! Product Features: - Includes: 1 x Make Your Own Concert Bracelets Set – Small (Styles Vary) - Each bracelet making kit comes with everything you need to stand out from the crowd at any concert! - Set features 6 premium charms and an array of beads - 4 stunning styles to collect (sold separately, styles vary) Safety Warning Warning Not suitable for children under 3 years
